violations.text: Individually wrapped pastry products observed without proper labeling with major allergens listed. Establishment is in the process of printing out the proper labels for baked goods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair, pulled away from the door. Gasket is to be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the white plate in ice machine, and rubber gaskets in cold draws have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and put out of service at the time of inspection. Ice machine is not to be used until it is cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

Open air unit was observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit on the top shelf, and 35 degrees Fahrenheit on the bottom shelf. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS foods were placed in unit within 2 hours of inspection. All TCS foods were moved to the bottom shelf at the time of inspection. No TCS food is to be stored on the top shelf until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or below. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the side of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must repair door. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The large walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. A ticket has been placed for service of walk-in cooler prior to inspection. All TCS foods had been removed from unit prior to inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is able to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 DF or below. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves, and refrigerators gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contacts surfaces should be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Outer surfaces and underside/backsplash areas of various equipment (milk dispensers, slushie machine, and nacho cheese dispenser) observed with an accumulation of dried food residues/debris. These areas must be cleaned often enough to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
